goal: Make the failing unittest suite pass by editing only wordscore/core.py. Implement score_phrase(text: str) so it lowercases whitespace-separated words and returns a dict of word counts. Run python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -t . before finishing. Do not modify tests and do not add dependencies.
